features: Classic British Oral Care Brand: Elevate your oral hygiene routine with Euthymol Mouthwash, a famous brand in the UK since 1898.
Distinctive Strong Taste Flavor: Experience a refreshing and clean sensation with Euthymol Mouthwash's special blend of ingredients and its distinctive strong taste.
Complete clean: Feel the invigorating tingle as Euthymol cleans every corner of your mouth, leaving you with a fresh, healthy feel.
Reduces Plaque and Promotes Healthy Teeth and Gums: The formulation, including eucalyptus and thymol, helps reduce plaque, ensuring clean and healthy teeth and gums.
Fights Bad Breath with Vitamin E: Euthymol Mouthwash contains vitamin E, which helps fight against bad breath while maintaining the mouth's natural environment.
Trusted by Generations in the UK: Embrace a refreshing daily oral care routine with Euthymol Mouthwash, a brand trusted by generations for its efficacy and distinctive taste.
description: Product Description Euthymol Mouthwash Original 500ml, Flouride Free, Distinctive Strong Taste Flavour, Reduce Plaque Gingival Clean Healthy Teeth Gums, Freshens Breath Refreshing Daily Oral Dental Care Ingredients Aqua, Glycerin, PEG-40, Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Poloxamer 407, Methyl Salicylate, Xanthan Gum, Sodium Benzoate, Cellulose Gum, Citric Acid, Thymol, Alcohol, Polysorbate 80, Glyceryl Distearate, Menthol, Glyceryl Stearate, Polyglyceryl-3, Polyricinoleate, Sodium Citrate, Tristearin, Sodium Saccharin, Tocopheryl Acetate, CI 17200, CI 15985 Directions For oral care and freshness: gargle and spit out 2-3 times a day after brushing your teeth. Safety Warning Recommended to be used under adult supervision Manufacturer Contact Information LG H&H Co., Ltd. 58, Saemunan-ro, Jongno-gu, Seoul, Korea. See more
